name_en: Tourist Office - Plaza de las Tendillas
name_local: Oficina de Turismo - Plaza de las Tendillas

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they book guided tours here
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, reh-ser-BAN vee-SEE-tahs gee-AH-dahs ah-KEE?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, we have that service available.

responses.english: Yes, we have that service available.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the information desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo encontrar el mostrador de información?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kohn-TRAHR ehl mohs-trah-DOHR deh een-fohr-mah-SYOHN?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del pasillo, mano izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh MAH-noh eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, left hand.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, left hand.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh MAH-noh eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Al fondo del pasillo, mano izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get city map
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger un mapa urbano?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh rreh-koh-HEHR oon MAH-pah oor-BAH-noh?

likely_response.local: Aquí mismo, en el mostrador principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: ah-k-Í MEE-smoh EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Here at the desk, free of charge.

responses.english: Here at the desk, free of charge.
responses.phonetic: ah-k-Í MEE-smoh EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Aquí mismo, en el mostrador principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are accessible patio routes
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿existen rutas de patios accesibles?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs eh-KSEE-stehn ROO-tahs DEH pah-TEE-ohs ahth-theh-SEEB-lehs

likely_response.local: Sí, en San Basilio y Centro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ EHN SAHN bah-see-LEE-oh Y THEHNT-roh

responses.phonetic: SÍ EHN SAHN bah-see-LEE-oh Y THEHNT-roh
responses.french: Sí, en San Basilio y Centro.
